name: Yodogawa Steel Works, Ltd.
summary: Yodogawa Steel Works, Ltd. manufactures and sells steel products for industrial and consumer products in Japan. The company offers steel sheets products comprising pre-painted and galvanized steel sheets, chromate-free treated steel sheets, cold rolled steel strips, special steel strips, steel strapping, and cold rolled steel sheets, as well as plated steel sheets, colored plated and printed steel sheets, and other types of steel sheets. It also provides exterior products for storage sheds, garages, carports, bicycle parks, warehouses, lodges, and trash bins; and building materials comprising roofing and siding, and environmental products. In addition, the company offers rolls for section steel, including plate and hot strip mill work rolls; paper manufacturing rolls; drilled rolls for rubber and vinyl; calender equipment for paper making; and cast iron rollers and other types of rollers. Further, it provides high-function grating products, as well as other gratings products, including pit and U-shaped covers. Additionally, the company is involved in the design and contracting of construction work; warehousing, packaging, and shipping activities; and sale, purchase, and lease of real estate, as well as building of facilities and landscaping activities. Yodogawa Steel Works, Ltd. was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
